spot_checks_performed: G083 compliance check (grep for blanket except Exception)
GLM stop token and prefix strip logic vs raw probe evidence
drift_findings: Test organization drift: hardening tests were placed in a new dedicated file (test_dispatcher_hardening.py) instead of expanding the existing test_dispatcher_chat_api.py. This is considered a structural improvement rather than a failure.

findings.G083: Full compliance. Core dispatcher implementation uses 5 specific exception types and catches only intended transient errors for retry. No generic exceptions found in src/aho/pipeline/dispatcher.py.
findings.Evidence_Alignment: Dispatcher configurations (num_gpu=30 for GLM, num_predict=2000 for Qwen) are directly derived from and supported by W1 fitness report findings (R2, F001).
findings.Model_Management: New helpers (unload_model, list_loaded_models, ensure_model_ready) correctly address W1 findings regarding Nemotron auto-load and GLM OOM behavior.
findings.Robustness: Implementation of exponential backoff and non-retryable systemic errors (template leaks, 404s) shows high technical maturity.
